subject: Artemis is back home. So is your offer.
body:
The Artemis II crew just made it home safely.

The crew is home.

Artemis II just splashed down safely in the Pacific — and we're celebrating! 👏

To mark this historic moment, we're adding an extra 10% off on top of your existing discount.
